message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false

interface CommandInt <<interface>> {
  + Execute() : void
}

class Commands {
  - shape : string
  + Commands(shape:string)
  + Execute() : void
  + Undo() : void
  + Redo() : void
  + PrintSVG() : void
  + CreateSVG() : void
  + {override} ToString() : string
}

class AddCMD {
  - shape : string
  + AddCMD(shape:String, history:List<string>)
  + Execute() : void
}

class UndoCMD {
  + UndoCMD(history:List<string>, redoList:List<string>)
  + Execute() : void
}

class RedoCMD {
  + RedoCMD(history:List<string>, redoList:List<string>)
  + Execute() : void
}

class PrintSVGCMD {
  + PrintSVGCMD(history:List<string>)
  + Execute() : void
}

class CreateSVGCMD {
  + CreateSVGCMD(history:List<string>)
  + Execute() : void
}

class "List 1" as List1

Commands ..|> CommandInt
AddCMD ..|> CommandInt
UndoCMD ..|> CommandInt
RedoCMD ..|> CommandInt
PrintSVGCMD ..|> CommandInt
CreateSVGCMD ..|> CommandInt

Commands --> CommandInt
AddCMD --> CommandInt
UndoCMD --> CommandInt
RedoCMD --> CommandInt
PrintSVGCMD --> CommandInt
CreateSVGCMD --> CommandInt

AddCMD --> List1 : history<string>
UndoCMD --> List1 : history<string>
UndoCMD --> List1 : redoList<string>
RedoCMD --> List1 : history<string>
RedoCMD --> List1 : redoList<string>
PrintSVGCMD --> List1 : history<string>
CreateSVGCMD --> List1 : history<string>
@enduml
